label: SLMP Multi PLC Monitor
info: Read-only two-PLC monitor. Successful reads produce long-form rows with timestamp, plc, tag, and value. Errors transition through lost/reconnecting and send msg.reinitialize after a 1s to 30s backoff.

name: Read-only multi-PLC monitor with reconnect backoff
info: Configure the two SLMP connection nodes before deploy. This flow uses only slmp-read nodes; no PLC write node is in the polling path.

name: line-a rows + state
line-b rows + state
line-a lost/reconnecting
line-b lost/reconnecting
